Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Аркана Помірності[n]може зараз допомогти мені поглибити наші стосунки...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you available tonight? I have borrowed a book about yakuza from the library.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was searching for combat-related material, and the librarian suggested this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}It seems to provide information on combat tactics as well as the proper mindset for battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, there are some elements that I don't fully comprehend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you may be able to help me understand them more. Would you be willing to try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}In regard to the yakuza novel that we had previously discussed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was able to acquire the entire series to which it belongs from the library.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}According to my data, this meets the prerequisite conditions for the activity known as a "binge."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have sufficient leisure time available, would you like to participate in this activity with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6075 0 0}Do you remember the yakuza novel we talked about before?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I was able to find the entire series in the library and decided to borrow them all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I understand correctly, if I read all the books back to back, I would be "binging."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have the time, would you like to "binge" with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, are you currently free from predetermined obligations at this moment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I would like to enlist your assistance in absorbing all necessary information from the yakuza novels.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis looks serious about this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with her could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}There is another matter I wish to discuss with you as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If possible, I would like to continue reading those novels together with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis looks serious about this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with her could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Actually... there's something else I would like to talk with you about as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}A classmate has recently lent me a number of various yakuza novels.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}She appeared pleased to have met "a fellow yakuza aficionado."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading yakuza novels with her[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_22_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you like to read together once again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6004 0 0}A classmate has lent me some yakuza novels that I haven't read yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}She seemed very happy when we talked and called me "a fellow yakuza aficionado."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading yakuza novels with her[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free, would you like to read some of them together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Since the two of us will be reading from one book, please open it wide so that we may both view its contents.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}But, um, we'll be reading from the same book, so... please open it wide so that we can both read.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6056 0 0}I understand... Sorry for bringing this up so abruptly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}If your schedule permits, I have a favor to ask of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I would like you to help me improve my reading comprehension abilities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6002 0 0}Um, if you have the time... there's something that I'd like your help understanding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm afraid there are some concepts that I have difficulty comprehending on my own...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Then I shall retrieve the book from my room. Please stand by until I return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}Thank you very much! I will go get the book, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6067 0 0}Would you like to read together, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading yakuza novels with her[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading yakuza novels with Aigis could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I would like to read together with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Is it correct that you tend to the planters on the rooftop, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am interested in attempting horticultural activities as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If such a task is within your purview of operations for the day, would it be acceptable for me to join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am both prepared and motivated to undertake this action. Shall we commence gardening?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Is it correct that you tend to the planters on the rooftop, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I am interested in attempting horticultural activities as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}If such a task is within your purview of operations for the day, would it be acceptable for me to join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I am both prepared and motivated to undertake this action. Shall we commence gardening?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0823_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6074 0 0}Is it correct that you tend to the planters on the rooftop, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I am interested in attempting horticultural activities as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}If such a task is within your purview of operations for the day, would it be acceptable for me to join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6077 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, you take care of the rooftop planters on occasion, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am actually somewhat interested in the process of growing plants myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, um, would it be all right if I accompanied you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am ready if you are. Would you like to head to the rooftop?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, I would like to suggest maintaining the rooftop garden today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}The plants are surely awaiting our continued care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have further analyzed data on home gardens. Let us proceed to the rooftop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6001 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, I would like to suggest maintaining the rooftop garden today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}The plants are surely awaiting our continued care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I have further analyzed data on home gardens. Let us proceed to the rooftop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6002 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, would you like to go tend to the planters together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want to deprive our plants of the care that they need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have been practicing how to properly mix fertilizer. I would like to try it out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Would you find it permissible to visit the rooftop again?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe it is time that we check on the progress of our cultivation efforts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems motivated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am ready to deploy at any time. Shall we engage, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Would you find it permissible to visit the rooftop again?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I believe it is time that we check on the progress of our cultivation efforts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I am ready to deploy at any time. Shall we engage, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0823_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}{f 4 2}-san, I would like to suggest maintaining the rooftop garden today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}"Summer break" is a time for experiences that cannot be had at any other time of the year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}By tending to a garden in high-temperature conditions, you may be able to achieve this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6061 0 0}If you have the time, would you like to go to the rooftop together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think it would be good to check up on our plants again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems motivated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm ready whenever. How about you, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6067 0 0}Do you intend to continue work on the rooftop planters today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if she helps me garden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am concerned that the vegetation may require additional care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6067 0 0}Do you intend to continue work on the rooftop planters today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}I am concerned that the vegetation may require additional care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6072 0 0}Do you want to check on the rooftop planters today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if she helps me garden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have been wondering how our plants are doing lately...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. I will begin making my way to the rooftop with maximum efficiency.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. I will begin making my way to the rooftop with maximum efficiency.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. Then I will remain on standby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. Then I will remain on standby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}Thank you! Then I will get prepared and head to the rooftop right away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6055 0 0}I see. Then perhaps it would be better if I refrain from going up today as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Is your attention preoccupied with the plants as well? Then we are "like-minded," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if I garden with her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Shall we make our way to the rooftop together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6059 0 0}Is your attention preoccupied with the plants as well? Then we are "like-minded," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}Shall we make our way to the rooftop together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6068 0 0}I'm sorry, but I just can't seem to get the garden off my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aigis will gain any[n]more skills even if I garden with her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}So... would you like to go to the rooftop together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_THINK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I plant...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it can be harvested on {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT_DORMITORY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I don't think I've planted[n]anything in the rooftop planters yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_CAN_NOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I won't be able to harvest it[n]before the Promised Day, January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should still be produce in the rooftop[n]planter that has yet to be harvested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should harvest those first...[n]{f 1 1}
